creator: ccs189@gmail.com
text:
Hi Support,
I have issue running the window application EAGLE software under the i386-wine-staging under FreeBSD 11.0-CURRENT #0 r285346. It used to be working for the lower version of wine.

If you require more information, I can test and send it.


[chan@x1-carbon-bsd ~]$ pkg info i386-wine-*
i386-wine-staging-1.7.53,1

The error messages is shwown below whenever I run the exe file:
=================================================================
[chan@x1-carbon-bsd ~/.wine/drive_c/EAGLE-7.1.0/bin]$ wine eagle.exe
fixme:winediag:start_process Wine Staging 1.7.53 is a testing version containing experimental patches.
fixme:winediag:start_process Please mention your exact version when filing bug reports on winehq.org.
fixme:ntdll:NtCreateNamedPipeFile Message mode not supported, falling back to byte mode.
fixme:heap:RtlSetHeapInformation 0x0 1 0x0 0 stub
fixme:process:SetProcessDEPPolicy (1): stub
fixme:heap:RtlSetHeapInformation 0x0 1 0x0 0 stub
fixme:ntdll:NtCreateNamedPipeFile Message mode not supported, falling back to byte mode.
fixme:ntdll:NtCreateNamedPipeFile Message mode not supported, falling back to byte mode.
fixme:ntdll:NtCreateNamedPipeFile Message mode not supported, falling back to byte mode.
fixme:ntdll:NtCreateNamedPipeFile Message mode not supported, falling back to byte mode.
fixme:system:SetProcessDPIAware stub!
wine: Unhandled page fault on write access to 0x00000010 at address 0x62fb538b (thread 0009), starting debugger...
err:seh:raise_exception Unhandled exception code c0000005 flags 0 addr 0x62d1da29
